## [00:00 - 02:24]

Hi, this is Don Crowther. Let's talk about the double the 5x rule of webinars. So you've heard of the 80-20 rule and there are lots of ways the 80-20 rule can apply to webinars. Like 20% of all webinars generate 80% of the sales and you all know the 80-20 rule is probably better defined as the 95-5 rule. And so we could say that 5% of all the webinars generate 95% of the sales. We'll call it 80-20. Okay. And 20% of those who attend a webinar will buy if you have a good webinar funnel and if you don't have a good attendance promotion for your webinar, only about 20% of the people who register will attend. But I'd like to focus on another rule that I call the double to 5x rule of webinars. Here's the way it works. A good webinar funnel can double to 5x the sales that you'll get from your webinar alone. So a good, actually let's rephrase that, a great webinar funnel can double to 5x the sales you're going to get from your webinar. And along with that rule comes its inverse. Not creating a solid webinar funnel will cost you half to 80% of the sales you could have generated from your webinar funnel. So it's up to you. You can make a choice. You can say, you know what, Don, all that webinar funnel stuff, it sounds like work. I don't want to do that. Okay. Just realize in making that decision that you're choosing to forgo half to 80% of all the sales you could have generated from this webinar. That's why we created the webinar funnel formula to help you do what's necessary to generate those additional sales. So I encourage you to think of it this way. If there is one thing that you can do that's almost guaranteed to double to 5x your sales, would you do it? Well, guess what? There is one thing. Create a webinar funnel. That's it.
